description: The CT Cranium DICOM scan is already loaded in InVesalius 3. A hospital IT department needs a legacy-compatible 3D model of the skull for an older surgical navigation system. Create a bone segmentation mask using the standard Bone preset and generate a 3D surface. Record the integer vertex count of the generated surface in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/mesh_info.txt and export the 3D surface as a VRML 2.0 file to /home/ga/Documents/legacy_skull.wrl.
